---
id: create-a-group
title: "CreateGroup"
description: "通过此接口创建群组。"
api: 
info_path: core_products/zim/zh/docs_zim_server_zh/group/open-api-desc
date: "2026-07-08"
---

<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>CreateGroup</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"post"} path={"/"}></MethodEndpoint>


通过此接口创建群组。

创建群组成功，通过以下 ZIM SDK 的回调接口，群主会收到群组创建成功的通知，其他群成员会收到加入群组的通知：

| iOS-25% | Android-25% | macOS-25% | Windows-25% |
|-----|---------|--------|---------|
| [groupStateChanged](/zim-ios/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimgroupstatechangedeventoperatedinfogroupinfo-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupStateChanged](/zim-android/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupstatechanged-zimeventhandler) | [groupStateChanged](/zim-macos/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimgroupstatechangedeventoperatedinfogroupinfo-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupStateChanged](/zim-win/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupstatechanged-zimeventhandler) |

| Web-25% | 小程序-25% | Flutter-25% |React Native-25% |
|-----|---------|---------|---------|
| [onGroupStateChanged](/zim-web/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupstatechanged-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupStateChanged](/zim-miniprogram/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupstatechanged-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupStateChanged](/zim-flutter/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupstatechanged-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupStateChanged](/zim-rn/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupstatechanged-zimeventhandler)|

|Unity3D-25% | uni-app \| uni-app x-25% |  HarmonyOS-25% |
|---------|--------------|-----------|
|[OnGroupStateChanged](/zim-u3d/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupstatechanged-zimeventhandler) | [groupStateChanged](/zim-uniapp-x/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#groupstatechanged-zimeventhandler)  | [groupStateChanged](/zim-harmonyos/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#groupstatechanged-zimeventhandler) |

<Note title="说明">
参数 `GroupOwner` 和 `UserId` 对应的用户已在客户端调用 `login` 方法登录 ZIM 服务，或开发者已调用 [服务端 API](/zim-server/user/batch-register-users) 注册相关的 userID。
</Note>

<Note title="说明">参数 GroupId 和 GroupOwner 仅支持数字，英文字符和 `'!','#','$','%','&','(',')','+','\'',':',';','<','=','.','>','?','@',
'[',']','^','_','{','}','|','~'`。</Note>

<Note title="说明">调用频率限制：20 次/秒。</Note>

## Request
<details style={{"marginBottom":"1rem"}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-params"}>Query Parameters</h3></summary><div><ul><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Action","in":"query","description":"> 接口原型参数\n>\n> https://zim-api.zego.im/?Action=CreateGroup\n","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["CreateGroup"]},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"AppId","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。应用 Id，由 ZEGO 分配的用户唯一凭证。可从 <a target=\"_blank\" href=\"https://console.zego.im/\">ZEGO 控制台</a> 获取。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"uint32"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureNonce","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。16 位 16 进制随机字符串（8 字节随机数的 hex 编码）。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Timestamp","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。当前 Unix 时间戳，单位为秒。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>，最多允许 10 分钟的误差。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureVersion","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名版本号。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"2.0","enum":["2.0"]}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Signature","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名，用于验证请求的合法性。请参考[签名机制](/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-mechanism)生成。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem></ul></div></details>
<MimeTabs className={"openapi-tabs__mime request"}><TabItem label={"application/json"} value={"application/json-schema"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details mime"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-mime"}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-body"}>Body</h3><strong className={"openapi-schema__required"}>required</strong></summary><ul className={"request-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"GroupId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 32 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"群 ID，群的唯一标识，不能以 “#” 开头。长度上限为 32 字节。为空则由 ZIM 服务端创建，并以 “#“ 开头定义。","maxLength":32,"example":"group"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"GroupName"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 50 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"群名称，长度上限为 50 字节。如需调整，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。","maxLength":50,"example":"group_name"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"GroupNotice"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 300 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"群公告，长度上限为 300 字节。如需调整，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。","maxLength":300,"example":"group_notice"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"GroupAvatar"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 500 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"群头像 URL，长度上限为 500 字节。如需调整，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。","maxLength":500,"example":"https://www.baidu.com/"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"GroupOwner"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 32 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"群主的用户 ID。长度上限为 32 字节。如需调整，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。","maxLength":32,"example":"owner"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"UserId"} required={false} schemaName={"string[]"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 100`"} schema={{"type":"array","description":"需要入群用户的 ID。每个用户 ID 的长度上限为 32 字节。如需调整，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。\n> **说明**\n>\n> - 此数组无需包含群主。如果包含了群主，ZIM 服务端会自动去重。\n> - 此数组用户的入群时间等于群组创建时间，即 CreateGroupTime。\n","maxItems":100,"items":{"type":"string"}}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>Attributes</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object[]</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>群属性。群属性上限为 10 个。如需调整，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。</div><li className={"opening-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"opening-array-bracket"}><span className={"opening-array-bracket_text"}>Array</span><span className={"opening-array-bracket_symbol"}>[</span></div></li><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Key"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"群属性的键，长度上限为 16 个字节。如需调整，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。","example":"key1"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Value"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"群属性的值，长度上限为 1024 个字节。如需调整，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。","example":"value1"}}></SchemaItem><li className={"closing-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"closing-array-bracket"}>]</div></li></div></details></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"CreateGroupTime"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"number","description":"创建群的时间戳（毫秒级别）。\n- 为 0 或者不填：默认群组为当前时间创建。\n- 为其他值：不可大于当前时间戳。\n","example":0}}></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem></MimeTabs>
<div><div><ApiTabs label={undefined} id={undefined}><TabItem label={"200"} value={"200"}><div>OK</div><div><MimeTabs className={"openapi-tabs__mime"} schemaType={"response"}><TabItem label={"application/json"} value={"application/json"}><SchemaTabs className={"openapi-tabs__schema"}><TabItem label={"Schema"} value={"Schema"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details response"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-response"}><strong>Schema</strong></summary><ul className={"response-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Code"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"number","description":"返回码。\n\n以下仅列出了接口业务逻辑相关的 Code 和 SubCode ，完整返回码请参考 [全局返回码](/zim-server/return-codes)。\n<table>\n<thead><tr><th>Code / SubCode</th><th>说明</th><th>处理建议</th></tr></thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr><td>660000002</td><td>参数错误。</td><td>请检查请求参数。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600010</td><td>超出调用频率限制。</td><td>请稍后再试。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600011</td><td>群已经存在。</td><td>请使用其他 GroupId。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600012</td><td>群数量超过限制。</td><td>请升级套餐。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600013</td><td>群主不存在。</td><td>请检查群主 ID 是否正确。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600014</td><td>修改群主的群列表出错。</td><td>请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600015</td><td>ZIM 服务端执行 db 操作出错。</td><td>请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600016</td><td>群成员数量超过限制。</td><td>请减少群成员数量。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600017</td><td>创建群时用户进群失败。</td><td>请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600019</td><td>属性数量超过限制。</td><td>默认最多 10 个。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600020</td><td>属性的 Key 或 Value 长度错误。</td><td>请检查长度。</td></tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n","example":0}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Message"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"操作结果描述。","example":"success"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"RequestId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"请求 ID。","example":"343649807833778782"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"GroupId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"群 ID。"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>Members</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object[]</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>入群成功用户信息。</div><li className={"opening-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"opening-array-bracket"}><span className={"opening-array-bracket_text"}>Array</span><span className={"opening-array-bracket_symbol"}>[</span></div></li><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"UserId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"群用户 ID。","example":"owner"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"UserName"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"群用户名称。","example":"owner"}}></SchemaItem><li className={"closing-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"closing-array-bracket"}>]</div></li></div></details></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>ErrorUsers</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object[]</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>入群失败用户信息。<ul><li>Code 为 0：</li><li> ErrorList 为空，全部指定用户入群成功。</li><li> ErrorList 不为空，表示部分指定用户入群失败，请参考 SubCode 处理。</li></ul><ul><li>Code 不为 0：</li><li>ErrorList 为空，表示参数错误、接口频率限制、系统错误。</li><li>ErrorList 不为空，表示全部指定用户入群失败。</li></ul></div><li className={"opening-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"opening-array-bracket"}><span className={"opening-array-bracket_text"}>Array</span><span className={"opening-array-bracket_symbol"}>[</span></div></li><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"UserId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"失败用户 ID。","example":"user2"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"SubCode"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"number","description":"用户入群失败的具体返回码，完整返回码请参考 Code 说明或者 [全局返回码](/zim-server/return-codes)。\n","example":660000015}}></SchemaItem><li className={"closing-array-bracket-container"}><div className={"closing-array-bracket"}>]</div></li></div></details></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example (from schema)"} value={"Example (from schema)"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"343649807833778782\",\n  \"GroupId\": \"string\",\n  \"Members\": [\n    {\n      \"UserId\": \"owner\",\n      \"UserName\": \"owner\"\n    }\n  ],\n  \"ErrorUsers\": [\n    {\n      \"UserId\": \"user2\",\n      \"SubCode\": 660000015\n    }\n  ]\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example"} value={"Example"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"343649807833778782\",\n  \"GroupId\": \"group\",\n  \"Members\": [\n    {\n      \"UserId\": \"owner\",\n      \"UserName\": \"owner\"\n    },\n    {\n      \"UserId\": \"user1\",\n      \"UserName\": \"user1\"\n    }\n  ],\n  \"ErrorUsers\": [\n    {\n      \"UserId\": \"user2\",\n      \"SubCode\": 660000015\n    }\n  ]\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem></SchemaTabs></TabItem></MimeTabs></div></TabItem></ApiTabs></div></div>
